protocol_notes: User is 29 years old. Currently attempting to taper off Cymbalta (SNRI antidepressant) after successful treatment of severe GERD and IBS. Considering BPC-157 to assist with antidepressant withdrawal. Had severe GERD and IBS symptoms for years due to stress and panic disorder. Symptoms resolved within weeks of starting Cymbalta approximately 2 years ago. Concerned that symptoms may return upon discontinuation of Cymbalta.
